case_title: DAVID BENITAH et al VS. LINDA LAW et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR DUC DOAN, HIEN AS ATTORNEY FOR BENITAH, DAVID

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER EXTENDING TIME FOR NOTICE OF SPECIAL MOTION AND SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE HEARING; DECLARATION OF DAVID BENITAH IN SUPPORT, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENITAH, DAVID GLOBOLEX INTERNATION LTD

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT LINDA LAW'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE (CCP SECTION 425.16) IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. EVEN IF THE COURT WERE TO REACH ITS MERITS, IT IS DOUBTFUL THAT THE ALLEGED DEFAMATION CONCERNS AN ISSUE OF PUBLIC INTEREST, BUT EVEN IF IT DID PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING BY PRESENTING EVIDENCE THAT THE STATEMENT THAT HE BACKDATED DCUMENTS IS FALSE. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
